---
title: "The Nearest MCDs"
---

## Prerequisites

```{r echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(tmap)   # map making package
# library(osrm)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(grid)
```

```{r}
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)

MCD <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","MCD.csv"), 
        options = c("X_POSSIBLE_NAMES=X", "Y_POSSIBLE_NAMES=Y"), 
        crs = 6668)
MCD$Type <- ifelse(MCD$Type == 2, 1, MCD$Type)
MCD$Type <- factor(MCD$Type, levels = c(1,3,4), labels=c("Core","Regional","Affiliated"))

MCD <- MCD[MCD$code_pref %in% c("16", "17", "18", "21", "23", "24", "25", "26"), ]
```

### Generate catchments

```{r}
ORS_API_KEY <- Sys.getenv("ORS_API_KEY")  # Fetch from ~/.Renviron

# 到達圏取得関数（車・徒歩・自転車を選べる）
get_isochrone <- function(lat, lon, 
                          profile = "driving-car", 
                          intervals = c(10000, 30000)) {
  # --- coordinate sanity check ---
  # Japan: longitude ≈ 120–145, latitude ≈ 30–45
  if (lon < 90 && lat > 90) {
    if (warn_if_swapped)
      warning(sprintf("Coordinates appear swapped (lat=%.2f, lon=%.2f); swapping.", lat, lon))
    tmp <- lon
    lon <- lat
    lat <- tmp
  }

  url <- paste0("https://api.openrouteservice.org/v2/isochrones/", profile)

  body <- list(
    locations = list(c(lon, lat)),
    range = intervals,
    range_type = "distance",     # 秒単位（time）か距離（distance）
    attributes = list("total_pop")
  )

  response <- POST(
    url,
    add_headers("Authorization" = ORS_API_KEY,
                "Content-Type" = "application/json"),
    body = toJSON(body, auto_unbox = TRUE)
  )

  stop_for_status(response)

  geojson <- content(response, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  sf_obj <- st_read(geojson, quiet = TRUE)
  return(sf_obj)
}
```

```{r}
all_isochrones <- list()
n <- nrow(MCD)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(MCD))) {
  lat <- st_coordinates(MCD)[i, 2]
  lon <- st_coordinates(MCD)[i, 1]
  attrs <- st_drop_geometry(MCD[i, ])
  try({
    iso <- get_isochrone(lat, lon)
    iso$Hospital <- attrs$Hospital
    all_isochrones[[i]] <- iso
    
    # --- Progress message ---
    message(sprintf("[%d / %d] %s done", i, n, attrs$Hospital))
    
    Sys.sleep(3.5)  # This does not exceed Quota per Minute
  })
}

iso_all <- do.call(rbind, all_isochrones)
iso_all <- iso_all %>% select(-c(center))
```
```{r}
st_write(iso_all, here::here("data","MCD_isochrones.geojson"), delete_dsn = TRUE)
```

## Single maps creation

```{r}
N03_small <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","N03_small.geojson"))
N03_small <- dplyr::filter(N03_small, 
                      N03_007 >= 16000 &
                      N03_007 < 30000  )
N03_small <- dplyr::filter(N03_small, 
                      N03_007 < 19000 |
                      N03_007 >= 21000  )
N03_small <- dplyr::filter(N03_small, 
                      N03_007 >= 23000 |
                      N03_007 < 22000  )
N03_small <- dplyr::filter(N03_small, 
                      N03_007 >= 29000 |
                      N03_007 < 27000  )
A38 <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","A38_small.geojson"))
A38_noncentre <- dplyr::filter(A38, 
                      A38b_003 == 1704 |
                      A38b_003 == 1802 |
                      A38b_003 == 1803 |
                      A38b_003 == 2311 |
                      A38b_003 == 2507 |
                      A38b_003 == 2902 |
                      A38b_003 == 2905 |
                      A38b_003 == 4102 |
                      A38b_003 == 4506  )
sfLake <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","lake.geojson"))
sfLabel <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","label_SHA_inpolygon.geojson"))
```

```{r include=FALSE}
Catchment <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","MCD_isochrones.geojson"))
Catchment <- dplyr::filter(Catchment, 
                      value == 30000)
Catchment$Catchment <- "30 kilometre by car from MCD"
Catchment$Catchment <- factor(Catchment$Catchment)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
MyPalette1 = c("lightgreen") 
MyPalette3 = c("#e853b2", "#2e33a6", "#459a64") 
jp_map = tm_graticules(labels.size = 0.4) +
  tm_shape(N03_small) +
  tm_polygons(col = "grey",
            fill = "white",
            lwd = 0.1) + 
  tm_shape(Catchment) +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "Catchment",                # use dummy variable
    fill.scale = tm_scale(values = MyPalette1),
    col = "green",
    lwd = 0.1,
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Catchment")
  ) +
  tm_shape(MCD) + 
  tm_symbols(fill = "Type",
             fill.scale = tm_scale(values = MyPalette3),
             col = "white",
             size = 0.2,
             lwd = 0.1,
             fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Medical Centres for Dementia")) +
  tm_shape(sfLake) +
  tm_polygons(col = "white", 
              fill = "lightblue", lwd = 0) + 
  tm_shape(A38_noncentre) +
  tm_borders(col = "red", lwd = 1) + 
  tm_add_legend(type = "borders", 
            col = "red",
            lwd = 1,
            title = "Secondary Healthcare Area with no Medical Centre for Dementia") +
  tm_shape(sfLabel) +
  tm_text(text = "SHA_name",
          size = 0.3) +
  tm_scalebar(text.size = 0.3,
              position = c("center", "top")) + 
  tm_compass(type = "4star", position = c("right", "bottom")) +
  tm_layout(legend.position = c("left","top"),
            legend.bg.color = "white",
            legend.title.size = 0.4,
            legend.text.size = 0.4,
            frame = FALSE)
```

```{r}
pdf(here::here("output","Catchment.pdf"))
grid.newpage()
pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(1, 1)))
print(jp_map, vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 1))
dev.off()
```
